metadata.title: Meapica — Real Stories You Can Touch
metadata.description: Bring back the magic of turning pages. Personalized stories printed on premium paper, designed to create moments of real connection.

hero.description: Bring back the magic of turning pages. Personalized stories printed on premium paper, designed to create moments of real connection, far from the glow of tablets.
hero.imageSubcaption: A sensory experience no screen can match.

howItWorks.title: Real magic in 3 artisanal steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Pick a plot designed to be read aloud and touch the heart.
howItWorks.step2Description: We tailor the watercolor-style illustrations so your child can recognize themselves.
howItWorks.step3Description: A physical book, lovingly bound, arrives at your door ready to be cherished.

bookCollection.title: Pick a story, add your child
bookCollection.subtitle: Illustrated stories ready to personalize. Choose your favorite and make your child the hero.
bookCollection.subtitleShowcase: Real stories created on our platform. Click to browse the complete book.

underwaterKingdom.title: The Underwater Kingdom
underwaterKingdom.description: Oceanic tones printed in archival quality.

quality.title: Objects made to stand the test of time
quality.description: It's not just a story, it's a tangible keepsake. We steer away from the digitally ephemeral to create sturdy books.
quality.bindingDescription: Thread-sewn with reinforced covers. Built to withstand the years and little hands.
quality.paperDescription: Munken 170g paper with a subtle cream tone to be gentle on the eyes. Naturally textured to the touch.

uniqueEdition.description: Every story we create is unrepeatable. The plot, the illustrations, the details: everything is generated once, exclusively for your child. No other child in the world will ever have the same book.
uniqueEdition.pillar1Description: Each plot is written from scratch based on your child's interests, dreams, and personality.
uniqueEdition.pillar2Description: Each watercolor is created once. These aren't templates: they're original pieces that will never exist again.
uniqueEdition.pillar3Description: Edition of one. No copies, no replicas. Only this one exists.

adventurePack.title: Artisanal Adventure Pack
adventurePack.description: The magic extends beyond the book. Includes a
adventurePack.descriptionEnd: from the main character, a sheet of matte stickers, and a wooden bookmark.

testimonials.title: Unplugged Families
testimonials.subtitle: What parents who chose paper over pixels have to say.

laura.name: Laura M.
laura.subtitle: Purchased "The Enchanted Forest"
laura.text: Finally something that doesn't need a charger. The book quality is stunning — it looks like it came from an antique bookshop, but with my son inside.

carlos.name: Carlos R.
carlos.subtitle: Purchased Premium Pack
carlos.text: The new-book smell when we opened the box was incredible. Physical details like the extra letter gave it a truly magical touch.

collectionOffer.title: Build their reading legacy
collectionOffer.description:
3 physical books = 20% discount.
Stories they'll keep for their own children.

footer.tagline:
Personalized storybook workshop.
Handcrafted, with ink and paper.
No batteries, just imagination.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Meapica, the privacy of our users — especially when it comes to children's data — is our top priority.
privacy.section1Text: Meapica is the data controller for personal data collected through meapica.com.
privacy.section2Text: We collect the data necessary to create your personalized book: child's name, age, city, interests, and physical characteristics for illustration. We also collect email and shipping address to process orders.
privacy.section3Text: We use your data exclusively to: generate the personalized story, process payment and shipping, and communicate with you about your order. We never sell data to third parties.
privacy.section4Text: Processing is based on the execution of the contract (your order) and your explicit consent when creating an account.
privacy.section5Text: We use Supabase (storage), Stripe (payments), and Gelato (printing) as third-party services. Each service has its own privacy policy.
privacy.section6Text: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and portability by contacting us at hola@meapica.com.
privacy.section7Text: We do not collect data directly from children. The child's data is provided by the parent or legal guardian who creates the book.

terms.title: Legal Notice and Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using meapica.com you accept the following terms.
terms.section1Text: Meapica is a personalized children's book creation platform operated from Spain.
terms.section2Text: Meapica offers the creation of personalized children's stories with unique illustrations, printed on demand.
terms.section3Text: Illustrations are created specifically for each book. The buyer receives a personal, non-commercial use license for the purchased book.
terms.section4Text: Prices include VAT and are displayed in euros. Payment is processed securely through Stripe.
terms.section5Text: Books are printed on demand. Delivery time is 7-14 business days. As personalized products, returns are not accepted except for manufacturing defects.
terms.section6Text: Meapica does not guarantee uninterrupted service availability. Illustrations may vary and a specific result is not guaranteed.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Meapica uses strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service.
cookies.section1Text: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when visiting a website.
cookies.section2Text: We only use technical cookies necessary to: keep your user session active, remember the selected language, and manage the purchase process. We do not use marketing or third-party tracking cookies.
cookies.section3Text: Stripe (payment processor) may set its own cookies during the checkout process. Please refer to Stripe's cookie policy for more information.
cookies.section4Text: You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect the operation of the service.

regenerateConfirm.title: Character has changed
regenerateConfirm.description: You've modified the character details since the portrait was created. Would you like to generate a new one?

step1.title: How do you want to create this adventure?
step1.subtitle: Your choice: prepare it as a surprise or enjoy the experience together as a family.

solo.title: I prepare it as a surprise
solo.subtitle: Secret Gift
solo.description: Design the story in secret while your child sleeps. You control every detail: the plot, the illustrations, and the personal message that will be printed inside.
solo.imageAlt: Parent preparing a surprise book on a laptop

juntos.title: We create it together
juntos.subtitle: Family Experience
juntos.description: An experience to enjoy as a family. Sit down with your child and make decisions together: which adventure to live, which characters to include, and how the story ends.
juntos.imageAlt: Father, mother and child creating together on a tablet

step2.title: Create your little hero
step2.subtitle: Customize the magical details to make the story unique.
step2.specialTraitPlaceholder: E.g.: Just lost a tooth, starting school this year...
step2.specialTraitHint: This detail will make the story truly unique and personal.
step2.companionLabel: Do they have a pet or special friend?
step2.companionPlaceholder: E.g.: Their cat Whiskers, their sister Lucy, their teddy bear...
step2.companionHint: They may appear as a surprise character in the story.
step2.favoriteFoodPlaceholder: E.g.: Pizza, mac and cheese, strawberry ice cream...
step2.futureDreamLabel: What do they want to be when they grow up?
step2.previewReady: Your hero is ready to live adventures with {interests}.
step2.previewDefault: Customize the magical details to make the story unique.
step2.interestsPrompt: Choose their interests to personalize the adventure...
step2.nebulaHint: Fill in the details and we'll bring your character to life
step2.nebulaHintReady: When you continue, we'll create {name} just as you describe

portraitReveal.generatingSubtitle: We're bringing your character to life, just as you described

step3.title: What adventure will {name} live?
step3.titleJuntos: What adventure do you want to live, {name}?
step3.subtitle: Select a magical story to begin the journey. Each tale is designed to spark their imagination.
step3.subtitleJuntos: Choose your favourite adventure. You decide what story this book will tell!

solo.title: The Book of a Thousand Choices
solo.subtitle: Customize the details of <highlight>{name}</highlight>'s story and watch the magic change.
solo.storyStart: Once upon a time there was a little explorer named
solo.storyLived: who lived at the edge of the unknown.
solo.unknownAfternoon: One afternoon, they decided to venture into the unknown...
solo.wouldFace: What they didn't know was that they would soon face
solo.specialMomentLabel: Is there a special moment you'd like to include?
solo.specialMomentPlaceholder: E.g.: Overcoming their fear of the dark, sharing with their sister, learning to be brave...
solo.specialMomentHint: We'll weave this moment into the story naturally.
solo.companionContext: Who will travel alongside {name}? This character will appear in key story moments and in the illustrations.
solo.atmosphereContext: Choose the time of day and the setting. These shape the emotional tone and visual style of every illustration.
solo.twistContext: Every great story has a challenge. This defines the emotional arc and the lesson {name} will learn along the way.

juntos.chooseNext: Choose the next step in the story!

step5.title: The Grand Finale
step5.subtitle: How do you want <highlight>{name}</highlight>'s adventure to end? You have the final word.
step5.subtitleSolo: Choose how the story ends and write a secret message to <highlight>{name}</highlight> that will be printed forever.
step5.dedicationPlaceholder:
Dear {name},
I wrote this story to remind you that you can always reach the stars.
With love, Mom.
step5.dedicationPlaceholderSolo:
Dear {name},
I created this book thinking of you, your curiosity, and that smile that lights everything up.
With all my love.
step5.chooseEndingFirst: Choose how the story ends first
step5.endingNoteLabel: Want to add something special to the ending?
step5.endingNotePlaceholder: E.g.: That {name} learns to face fears, makes up with a sibling...
step5.endingNoteHint: We'll weave this detail into the ending naturally.
